input_arguments.description: Set the target size in pixels and lines

input_arguments.description: Override the projection for the output file

input_arguments.name: overwrite
input_arguments.description: Whether overwriting existing output is allowed

input_arguments.name: bbox
input_arguments.description: Select only points contained within the specified bounding box

input_arguments.name: zfield
input_arguments.description: Field name from which to get Z values.

input_arguments.name: zoffset
input_arguments.description: Value to add to the Z field value (applied before zmultiply)

input_arguments.name: zmultiply
input_arguments.description: Multiplication factor for the Z field value (applied after zoffset)

input_arguments.name: radius1
input_arguments.description: First axis of the search ellipse

input_arguments.name: radius2
input_arguments.description: Second axis of the search ellipse

input_arguments.name: angle
input_arguments.description: Angle of search ellipse rotation in degrees (counter clockwise)

input_arguments.name: min-points
input_arguments.description: Minimum number of data points to use

input_arguments.name: max-points
input_arguments.description: Maximum number of data points to use

input_arguments.name: min-points-per-quadrant
input_arguments.description: Minimum number of data points to use per quadrant

input_arguments.name: max-points-per-quadrant
input_arguments.description: Maximum number of data points to use per quadrant

input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: active-geometry
input_arguments.description: Geometry field name to which to restrict the processing (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: method
input_arguments.description: Algorithm to use when repairing invalid geometries.

input_arguments.name: keep-lower-dim
input_arguments.description: Keep components of lower dimension after MakeValid()

sub_algorithms.name: segmentize
sub_algorithms.description: Segmentize geometries of a vector dataset.

input_arguments.name: active-layer
input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: active-geometry
input_arguments.description: Geometry field name to which to restrict the processing (if not specified, all)

sub_algorithms.name: set-type
sub_algorithms.description: Modify the geometry type of a vector dataset.

input_arguments.name: active-layer
input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: active-geometry
input_arguments.description: Geometry field name to which to restrict the processing (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: layer-only
input_arguments.description: Only modify the layer geometry type

input_arguments.name: feature-only
input_arguments.description: Only modify the geometry type of features

input_arguments.name: multi
input_arguments.description: Force geometries to MULTI geometry types

input_arguments.name: single
input_arguments.description: Force geometries to non-MULTI geometry types

input_arguments.name: linear
input_arguments.description: Convert curve geometries to linear types

input_arguments.name: curve
input_arguments.description: Convert linear geometries to curve types

input_arguments.name: dim
input_arguments.description: Force geometries to the specified dimension

input_arguments.name: skip
input_arguments.description: Skip feature when change of feature geometry type failed

sub_algorithms.name: simplify
sub_algorithms.description: Simplify geometries of a vector dataset.

input_arguments.name: active-layer
input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: active-geometry
input_arguments.description: Geometry field name to which to restrict the processing (if not specified, all)

sub_algorithms.name: swap-xy
sub_algorithms.description: Swap X and Y coordinates of geometries of a vector dataset.

input_arguments.name: active-layer
input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: active-geometry
input_arguments.description: Geometry field name to which to restrict the processing (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: active-layer
input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)

pipeline_algorithms.name: select
pipeline_algorithms.description: Select a subset of fields from a vector dataset.

input_arguments.name: active-layer
input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)

pipeline_algorithms.name: sql
pipeline_algorithms.description: Apply SQL statement(s) to a dataset.

input_arguments.name: overwrite
input_arguments.description: Whether overwriting existing output is allowed

input_arguments.name: update
input_arguments.description: Whether to open existing dataset in update mode

input_arguments.name: overwrite-layer
input_arguments.description: Whether overwriting existing layer is allowed

input_arguments.name: append
input_arguments.description: Whether appending to existing layer is allowed

sub_algorithms.name: rasterize
sub_algorithms.description: Burns vector geometries into a raster.

input_arguments.name: band
input_arguments.description: The band(s) to burn values into (1-based index)

input_arguments.name: 3d
input_arguments.description: Indicates that a burn value should be extracted from the Z values of the feature

input_arguments.name: nodata
input_arguments.description: Assign a specified nodata value to output bands

input_arguments.name: init
input_arguments.description: Pre-initialize output bands with specified value

input_arguments.name: crs
input_arguments.description: Override the projection for the output file

input_arguments.name: transformer-option
input_arguments.description: Set a transformer option suitable to pass to GDALCreateGenImgProjTransformer2

input_arguments.name: target-aligned-pixels
input_arguments.description: (target aligned pixels) Align the coordinates of the extent of the output file to the values of the resolution

input_arguments.name: size
input_arguments.description: Set the target size in pixels and lines

input_arguments.name: optimization
input_arguments.description: Force the algorithm used (results are identical)

input_arguments.name: update
input_arguments.description: Whether to open existing dataset in update mode

input_arguments.name: overwrite
input_arguments.description: Whether overwriting existing output is allowed

sub_algorithms.name: reproject
sub_algorithms.description: Reproject a vector dataset.

input_arguments.name: overwrite
input_arguments.description: Whether overwriting existing output is allowed

input_arguments.name: update

input_arguments.name: overwrite-layer
input_arguments.description: Whether overwriting existing layer is allowed

input_arguments.name: append
input_arguments.description: Whether appending to existing layer is allowed

input_arguments.name: active-layer
input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)
